ASTValidator: Accepted. It validates generic TypeScript AST nodes. Since engines are pure TypeScript, they will pass flawlessly.
SyntaxGate: Accepted. It only checks for markdown pollution or malformed JavaScript syntax.
FunctionalValidator: Ignored/Accepted. Current FunctionalValidator primarily checks if the UI renders and API endpoints return 200s. It will ignore internal engine files without crashing.
PlaceholderValidator: Accepted. Engines do not contain 'Execute Action' strings.
RepairAgent: Accepted. The RepairAgent relies on stdout from the TypeScript compiler (tsc). If the engine code has a type error, the repair agent will fix it just as easily as it fixes a React component.
